title: ECP5: reg has an unprocessed 'init' attribute
body:
When synthesizing a design for ECP5 that has an initialization for a register, such as

    reg [30:0] 	 counter = 31'hA5A5A5A5;

Yosys emits this warning:

    Warning: Wire blinky.counter has an unprocessed 'init' attribute.

From reading the ECP5 FPGA Libraries Reference Guide, it appears that the ECP5 doesn't have a way to initialize the registers to a value. Could the solution used on iCE40 of adding inverters to the register also be implemented for ECP5?
